content.speakerText: Should we plan another get-together soon?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们该不该计划下一次聚会？
expectedAnswers: Absolutely! How about next Friday night? I'll send you the details.
Definitely! I'm thinking next weekend—let me confirm my plans and get back to you.
Yes, I miss our hangouts! What day works best for you?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确支持并推动后续安排，而非仅表示同意
语言准确性：是否正确使用提议句型（How about..., Let me check...）
表达自然度：语气是否友好、口语化，避免书面语或过于正式
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'plan', 'next', 'confirm', 'get back to you' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I had a great time last night. Want to do this again?
content.speakerTextCn: 昨晚玩得很开心，想再约一次吗？
expectedAnswers: Me too! How about next Saturday? I'm free in the afternoon.
I'd love to! Let me check my calendar and get back to you by tomorrow.
Absolutely! Maybe dinner this time? What do you think?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否积极回应并提出具体建议或承诺确认
语言准确性：是否正确使用 'How about...', 'Let me check...', 'get back to you' 等表达
表达自然度：语气是否真诚、口语化，有情感共鸣
关键词覆盖：是否使用 'again', 'next', 'check', 'get back to you' 等核心表达

content.scenarioHint: 你刚和朋友结束一次愉快的聚会，想主动询问对方是否愿意下次再约一次活动
expectedAnswers: Hey, that was so much fun—want to do this again next weekend?
Would you be up for another get-together sometime soon?
Let’s plan another hangout—any time next week work for you?
I really enjoyed tonight—how about we repeat this next month?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了希望再次聚会的意图
语言准确性：语法和时态使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合母语者日常口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了如 'again', 'next week', 'get-together' 等场景关键词
